name: CVS Health Corporation
description: CVS Health Corporation is a leading healthcare innovation company guided by a common purpose: helping people on their path to better health. The company operates through several segments, including Health Care Benefits, Pharmacy Services, and Retail/LTC. It provides a diversified suite of healthcare solutions, including retail pharmacy, pharmacy benefit management, health insurance plans through Aetna, and primary care services. CVS Health connects millions of people to affordable, high-quality care through its local presence, digital channels, and dedicated healthcare professionals.
